_notes: parallel edges: tasks executable concurrently in the same wave.

parallel.rationale: Verify tasks read different parts of the codebase; no shared mutable state. Run all 10 in parallel.
Three independent code-scan tasks. D-4 depends on D-1; D-5 depends on D-3.
Seed sections are append-only to convex/seed.ts in distinct sections. Coordinate write merge but each design is independent.
Each test is a separate vitest spec; no shared mutable test state.
